title: Saudi Arabia: Filipino domestic worker arrested in Madinah after child fatally stabbed at home
summary_full: A Filipino domestic worker has been arrested in Saudi Arabia's Madinah region, accused of fatally stabbing a child in his home. Security patrols apprehended the suspect shortly after the alleged attack. The case has now been transferred to the Public Prosecution for further investigation and legal proceedings, as confirmed by Saudi Arabia's Public Security.
